documents.content:
LM358 Dual Operational Amplifier Datasheet
1. DESCRIPTION
            The LM358 consists of two independent, high-gain,
            internal frequency-compensated operational amplifiers.
2. ABSOLUTE MAXIMUM RATINGS
            Supply Voltage: 32V (single), ±16V (dual)
            Differential Input Voltage: 32V
            Input Voltage: -0.3V to 32V
            Output Short-Circuit Duration: Indefinite
            Power Dissipation: 830 mW

2. ABSOLUTE MAXIMUM RATINGS
            Supply Voltage: 32V (single), ±16V (dual)
            Differential Input Voltage: 32V
            Input Voltage: -0.3V to 32V
            Output Short-Circuit Duration: Indefinite
            Power Dissipation: 830 mW
3. ELECTRICAL CHARACTERISTICS
            Supply Voltage: 3V to 32V (single)
            Quiescent Current: 500 μA (typical)
            Input Bias Current: 45 nA (typical)
            Input Offset Voltage: 3 mV (max)
            Input Offset Current: 5 nA (max)

3. ELECTRICAL CHARACTERISTICS
            Supply Voltage: 3V to 32V (single)
            Quiescent Current: 500 μA (typical)
            Input Bias Current: 45 nA (typical)
            Input Offset Voltage: 3 mV (max)
            Input Offset Current: 5 nA (max)
4. PERFORMANCE
            Open-Loop Gain: 100 dB (typical)
            Gain-Bandwidth Product: 700 kHz
            Slew Rate: 0.3 V/μs
            Input Impedance: 1 MΩ
            Output Impedance: 100 Ω

4. PERFORMANCE
            Open-Loop Gain: 100 dB (typical)
            Gain-Bandwidth Product: 700 kHz
            Slew Rate: 0.3 V/μs
            Input Impedance: 1 MΩ
            Output Impedance: 100 Ω
5. PIN CONFIGURATION
            Pin 1: Output A
            Pin 2: Inverting Input A (-)
            Pin 3: Non-inverting Input A (+)
            Pin 4: VCC (Ground for single supply)
            Pin 5: Non-inverting Input B (+)
            Pin 6: Inverting Input B (-)
            Pin 7: Output B
            Pin 8: VCC+ (Positive supply)

5. PIN CONFIGURATION
            Pin 1: Output A
            Pin 2: Inverting Input A (-)
            Pin 3: Non-inverting Input A (+)
            Pin 4: VCC (Ground for single supply)
            Pin 5: Non-inverting Input B (+)
            Pin 6: Inverting Input B (-)
            Pin 7: Output B
            Pin 8: VCC+ (Positive supply)
6. APPLICATIONS
            - Signal conditioning
            - Active filters
            - Buffers
            - Comparators
            - Voltage followers
            - Summing amplifiers

6. APPLICATIONS
            - Signal conditioning
            - Active filters
            - Buffers
            - Comparators
            - Voltage followers
            - Summing amplifiers
7. TYPICAL CIRCUITS
            Non-inverting Amplifier: Gain = 1 + Rf/Rg
            Inverting Amplifier: Gain = -Rf/Rg
            Voltage Follower: Gain = 1
